nasb.text: Declare in Judah and proclaim in Jerusalem, and say, “Blow the trumpet in the land; Cry aloud and say, ‘Assemble yourselves, and let us go Into the fortified cities.’

esv.text: Declare in Judah, and proclaim in Jerusalem, and say, “Blow the trumpet through the land; cry aloud and say, ‘Assemble, and let us go into the fortified cities!’

cnv.text: “你們應當在猶大宣告， 在耶路撒冷傳揚，說： ‘要在境內吹號。’ 高聲呼叫，說： ‘你們要集合起來，我們要進到堅固的城裡去！’

ccb.text: “你们要在犹大和耶路撒冷宣告， ‘要在全国吹起号角’，高声呼喊， ‘要集合起来， 我们要逃进坚城。’
